# 1ai-Affiliate — Affiliate Tracking Platform

> Self-hosted CPA tracking with sub-ms redirects, modular integrations, and template-driven entity creation. AI-agent friendly: MCP server, llms.txt, structured API.

## For AI Agents

This is a self-hosted affiliate marketing tracking platform. You can manage it programmatically via REST API or MCP tools.

### Quick Start

- **Base URL**: `http://localhost:3001` (or your deployment URL)
- **Auth**: JWT Bearer token from `POST /api/auth/login`
- **API Docs**: `/api-docs` (interactive) or `/integration-api-docs.md` (integrations)

### Core Concepts

- **Traffic Source**: An ad platform (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.) with stored credentials
- **Offer**: A product/offer being promoted, with payout and postback config
- **Campaign**: Links a traffic source to an offer with targeting rules
- **Click**: Recorded when a user follows a smartlink/tracking link
- **Conversion**: Recorded via S2S postback when a click leads to a sale

### Integration System

The platform uses a **plugin architecture** for ad platform integrations. Each integration is a self-contained module in `server/integrations/platforms/`. The registry auto-discovers all modules.

**Available integrations** (auto-detected):
- Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram)
- Google Ads (Search/Display/YouTube)
- TikTok Ads

**Adding a new integration**: Copy `server/integrations/platforms/_template.js`, fill in 3 functions (`meta`, `testConnection`, `fetchStats`), restart server. No other files need changing.

### Key API Endpoints

#### Authentication
- `POST /api/auth/login` → `{ token }`
- `POST /api/auth/register` → create account

#### Integrations
- `GET /api/admin/traffic-sources/integrations` → list all available integrations with auth field schemas
- `POST /api/admin/traffic-sources/:id/connect` → connect a platform (body: `{ platform_type, ...credentials }`)
- `POST /api/admin/traffic-sources/:id/sync` → sync campaign stats from the platform
- `GET /api/admin/traffic-sources/:id/daily-stats` → get synced stats

#### Tracking
- `GET /go/:hash` → redirect click (302)
- `POST /postback` → record conversion (S2S postback)
- `GET /go/honeypot/:campaignId` → fraud trap (hidden from users)

#### Reports
- `GET /api/admin/reports/clicks` → paginated click log
- `GET /api/admin/reports/conversions` → conversion log
- `GET /api/admin/reports/ads` → merged ad spend + commission report
- `GET /api/admin/reports/daily?group_by=hourly|daily|weekly|monthly` → time-series
- `GET /api/admin/reports/breakdown?dimension=country|device|os|browser` → dimension breakdown
- `GET /api/admin/reports/attribution?model=first|last|linear` → attribution model
- `POST /api/admin/reports/custom` → custom report builder

#### Campaigns & Offers
- `GET/POST /api/admin/campaigns` → CRUD
- `GET/POST /api/admin/offers` → CRUD
- `GET/POST /api/admin/advertisers` → CRUD

#### Fraud
- `GET /api/admin/fraud/dashboard` → 24h fraud stats
- Honeypot links auto-generated per campaign

#### Webhooks
- `POST /api/admin/webhooks` → register webhook
- Events: click, conversion, fraud_block, cap_reached

### Tech Stack

- **Edge**: Go (sub-ms redirect, Kafka, Redis, ClickHouse)
- **API**: Node.js Express (JWT, Zod validation)
- **Frontend**: React 19 SPA (Vite, Tailwind CSS v4)
- **Tracking Engine**: PHP 8.3+ (legacy, shared MySQL)
- **Event Stream**: Kafka / Redpanda
- **Analytics**: ClickHouse (90-day TTL, monthly partitions)
- **Cache**: Redis Cluster
- **DB**: MySQL 8.0+

### Template System

All major entities support templates: traffic-sources, advertisers, offers, campaigns, smartlinks, landing-pages, shortlinks.
Each template is a JSON file in `server/templates/<entity-type>/`. Drop a file → it appears in the UI and API.

- `GET /api/templates` — list all templates grouped by entity type
- `GET /api/templates/:entityType` — list templates for one entity type
- `POST /api/templates/:entityType/:templateId/apply` — merge template defaults with user values

### MCP Server

`mcp/server.js` — stdio MCP server with 10 tools: list_integrations, connect_integration, sync_traffic_source, list_traffic_sources, get_fraud_dashboard, get_reports, create_campaign, create_offer, list_templates, create_from_template.

Config: `mcp/mcp.json` (for Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.)

### Files of Interest

- `server/integrations/registry.js` — integration auto-discovery
- `server/integrations/platforms/` — one file per ad platform
- `server/integrations/platforms/_template.js` — copy this to add new integrations
- `server/templates/` — JSON templates for all entity types
- `server/services/templateRegistry.js` — template auto-discovery + validation
- `server/services/fraudRuleEngine.js` — unified fraud scoring
- `server/services/capiService.js` — Meta/Google Conversion API
- `edge/cmd/edgeredirect/main.go` — Go edge redirect server
